testcase.name: test_undo_change_if_available

failure.message: AssertionError: undo success not true: {'success': False, 'reverted': 0, 'original': 'Injury Flags: Shoulder (general), Rotator Cuff, Elbow (tendinitis/pain), Lower Back / Lumbar, Hamstring, Nerve / Sciatica, Upper Back / Thoracic, SI Joint / Pelvis', 'replacement': 'Injury Flags: SI Joint / Pelvis', 'week': 1, 'message': 'No matching exercise found to undo (may already be different)'} assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8aefe198d40>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8aefe198d40> = {'message': 'No matching exercise found to undo (may already be different)', 'original': 'Injury Flags: Shoulder (general), Rotator Cuff, Elbow (tendinitis/pain), Lower Back / Lumbar, Hamstring, Nerve / Sciatica, Upper Back / Thoracic, SI Joint / Pelvis', 'replacement': 'Injury Flags: SI Joint / Pelvis', 'reverted': 0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2_batch3.py:215: in test_undo_change_if_available assert undo_data.get("success") is True, f"undo success not true: {undo_data}" E AssertionError: undo success not true: {'success': False, 'reverted': 0, 'original': 'Injury Flags: Shoulder (general), Rotator Cuff, Elbow (tendinitis/pain), Lower Back / Lumbar, Hamstring, Nerve / Sciatica, Upper Back / Thoracic, SI Joint / Pelvis', 'replacement': 'Injury Flags: SI Joint / Pelvis', 'week': 1, 'message': 'No matching exercise found to undo (may already be different)'} E assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8aefe198d40>('success') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8aefe198d40> = {'message': 'No matching exercise found to undo (may already be different)', 'original': 'Injury Flags: Shoulder (general), Rotator Cuff, Elbow (tendinitis/pain), Lower Back / Lumbar, Hamstring, Nerve / Sciatica, Upper Back / Thoracic, SI Joint / Pelvis', 'replacement': 'Injury Flags: SI Joint / Pelvis', 'reverted': 0, ...}.get
